subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Aṣghar! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from His Most Great Prison, that He may draw thee nigh unto God, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی اصغر یذکرک المظلوم من شطر سجنه الاعظم لیقربک الی الله العزیز الوهاب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
